data.title: 6K Additive Hosts Congressman Guy Reschenthaler to Highlight Domestic Production of Critical Refractory Metals
data.description: In Burgettstown, Pennsylvania, on April 13, 2026, 6K Additive, Inc. (ASX: 6KA), a prominent manufacturer of high-performance metal powders in the U.S., hosted Congressman Guy Reschenthaler (PA-14) at its facility. This visit highlighted the significant emphasis on developing domestic production capabilities.

data.title: Strategy closes in on BlackRock's ETF holdings with $1B Bitcoin buy, needs 9,000 BTC to overtake.
data.description: After their recent Bitcoin acquisition, Strategy needs just 9,000 BTC to exceed the investment vehicle of industry leader BlackRock.
Company announces a buy-back plan worth $500 million to increase shareholder value.

data.title: Richard J. Fehir, Ph.D. Joins Bergeson & Campbell, P.C. and The Acta Group
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Bergeson & Campbell, P.C. (B&C®) and The Acta Group (Acta®) welcomed Richard (Rick) J. Fehir, Ph.D. as their new Senior Chemist/Regulatory Scientist. Dr. Fehir's addition strengthens the firms' already formidable team working on EPA-related matters.

data.title: Estrella Insurance Makes Protecting Your Personal Data Part of the Customer Experience
data.description: Estrella Insurance has announced the implementation of new security measures to safeguard customer data. These measures include the establishment of a 24/7 security operations center and the deployment of advanced real-time threat detection systems in Miami. These enhancements aim to strengthen the protection of sensitive information and ensure continuous monitoring for potential security breaches. The company's commitment to enhancing security is reflected in the significant investment in these systems, demonstrating a proactive approach to safeguarding customer data. This initiative highlights Estrella Insurance's dedication to providing a secure environment for its customers and reinforces its commitment to data protection.

data.title: What's Going On With BitGo Stock Monday?
data.description: BitGo Prime, a division of BitGo Holdings Inc. (NYSE: BTGO), announced that tradias has joined its liquidity network to improve institutional access to digital asset markets. By adding tradias, BitGo Prime aims to enhance liquidity and execution quality for institutional clients by expanding its network of exchanges, market makers, and counterparties. This move is expected to optimize trade execution by offering competitive pricing through liquidity aggregation. CEO Mike Belshe emphasized the importance of expanding the liquidity network to meet institutional expectations for execution quality. Both companies emphasized their regulated infrastructure, with BitGo providing insured cold storage custody and tradias adhering to strict compliance standards. As of the latest data, BTGO is trading at $8.45, which is 5.8% below its 20-day simple moving average. This partnership is intended to bolster institutional trading capabilities and market access for both firms.

data.title: Golden Gate University Announces GGU Digital, an AI Global Education Platform
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Golden Gate University (GGU) revealed the establishment of GGU Digital, a fresh segment aimed at providing top-notch yet cost-effective degrees on a worldwide level with the help of AI-powered teaching methods and multilingual support. The division will be headquartered in San Francisco.

data.title: Bringing Agentic Finance to Telegram: Byreal Debuts RealClaw, Transitioning Onchain Finance to an Agent-First Economy
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in Dubai, the decentralized exchange (DEX) Byreal, supported by Bybit and tailored for the Solana ecosystem, revealed RealClaw. This innovative development signifies a move towards financial systems that cater to agentic trading. RealClaw enables individual traders to engage in autonomous trading activities.

data.title: CHICKEN SALAD CHICK NAMES BRIAN LINDLEY AS CHIEF DEVELOPMENT OFFICER TO ACCELERATE STRATEGIC FRANCHISE GROWTH
data.description: Experienced real estate and franchise development executive to lead the growth of a popular fast-casual chicken salad restaurant brand. On April 13, 2026, Chicken Salad Chick revealed the selection of Brian Lindley as their leader for expanding into fresh markets. This move marks an important step in the brand's journey, being the only fast-casual chicken salad restaurant in the country.

data.title: Trident Digital Tech Holdings Establishes Joint Venture to Drive Ghana’s Digital Transformation, Targeting Up to US$800 Million in Combined Revenue
data.description: A new joint venture entity has been established to operate Ghana's "Digital Citizen" public-private partnership program led by the government. The program aims to enhance digital services for citizens. The joint venture entity will facilitate the collaboration between the government and private sector to achieve this goal. This initiative is part of the government's efforts to improve digital infrastructure and services in the country. The partnership is set to receive significant funding, with an investment of around $50 million expected to be allocated for its implementation.

data.title: VGTel, Inc. (OTCID:VGTL) Announces Provisional Patent Filing and Public Release of MiraLink™ Signal Intelligence Framework
data.description: VGtel has recently made public the release of their MiraLink™ Signal Intelligence Framework, alongside the filing of a provisional patent. This innovative technology aims to revolutionize signal intelligence capabilities and is set to impact a wide range of industries. The company is pushing the boundaries of innovation in this realm, with a focus on advancing efficiency and effectiveness in signal processing. This announcement marks a significant milestone for VGtel as they continue to make advancements in the field of signal intelligence.

data.title: Lidl and 1GLOBAL: Shaping the Future of Mobile Connectivity Together
data.description: A collaboration between 1GLOBAL and Lidl, both based in Neckarsulm, Germany, is set to revolutionize mobile connectivity. The exclusive partnership aims to enhance Lidl Connect, promising significant advancements in this sector.
